title: Sentinel Shield project tool-policy override
description: Validates a project's .sentinel-shield/tool-policy.yaml (parsed to JSON). A project may only adjust the 'policy' of a tool the profile already declares; it cannot add packages, runners, or report paths. CONSTRAINTS (enforced by the resolver, documented here): a project CANNOT disable a non-suppressible security control (e.g. secrets detection) without a documented accepted-risk/policy record, and CANNOT convert an execution-error into a pass. Precedence on merge: required > recommended > optional > disabled.

tools.description: Map of tool key -> policy-only override. Keys must match a tool declared by the active profile.
